urdu transliteration text:
Voh Chaand Chhupa Hai Zahra Ka,
Ab Shaam Key Kaaley Baadal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The moon of Zahra is hiding behind the dark clouds

urdu transliteration text:
Saadaat Key Khoon Ki Baarish Hai,
Har Samt Balaa Key Jangal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The blood of Sadat is spreading over everything

urdu transliteration text:
Kya Qadr Yazeedi Faujon Ney Ki
Zaakir-e-Dosh-e-Ahmad Ki
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The army of yazeed showed no respect of the one who rode over the shoulder of Rasul Allah

urdu transliteration text:
Theen Khushiyaan Khoon-e-Sarwar Ki Har Samt Sawaar-o-Paydal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Everyone from the yazedi army was celebrating over the blood shedding of Hussain A.S

urdu transliteration text:
Kaisey They Musalmaan Do Boondayn Shabbir Key Bachchon Ko Na Mileen
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The Muslims didn’t even give a couple of drops of water to the children of Shabbir

urdu transliteration text:
Ghoron Ko Diya BeyDeenon Ney Bhar Bhar Key Jo Paani Chhaagal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The enemies of Imam gave water to their horses again and again but not to the companions of Imam

urdu transliteration text:
Abbas Nahin Akbar Bhi Nahin Ghurbat Mein Bachaaney Aaey Kaun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Neither Abbas nor Ali Akbar are there to save us

urdu transliteration text:
Ik Duniya Khoon Ki Pyaasi Hai,
Shabbir Hain Tanha Jangal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The world is thirsty for the blood of Shabbir and Hussain is alone

urdu transliteration text:
Khud Apnay Lahoo Sey Dhoya Hai,
Islaam Key Rukh Ka Gard-o-Ghubaar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: With his (Imam) own blood He cleansed the dirt on the face Islam

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain sacrificed his own life to save the Deen
Yun Jaan Laraa Di Sarwar Ney Aaeena-e-Deen Ki Sayqal Main
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Arbaab-e-Nazar Dekheyn Yeh Samaan, Zaalim Ney Lagaaya Teer-e-Sitam
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The ones who bear the sight will witness the tyrant who attack (Imam) with arrows

urdu transliteration text:
Beysheer Key Lab Par Halki Hansi,
Aur Saari Khudaai Halchal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The little smile of young baby shook the entire world

urdu transliteration text:
Koofey Ki Thi Zainab Shehzadi,
Ab Qaidi Ban Kar Aayi Hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The same Zainab who was the princess of Kufa has now became a prisoner

urdu transliteration text:
Duniya Ko Badaltey Deykh Liya Taqdeer Key Haathon Ik Pal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The fate of whole world got flipped in a fraction of a second

urdu transliteration text:
Aagosh-e-Khizaan Mein Teer Saba Sehrey Key Khiley Murjhaaey Huey
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: In the season of sorrow even the wedding flowers blooming faded

urdu transliteration text:
Ik Shab Ka Byaaha Dulha Hai Bey Rahm Qaza Key Chungal Mein
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Even the newly-wed groom is in the death trap
